scripts.build: pnpm --filter @stripe-access-management/core build && pnpm --filter @stripe-access-management/database build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @stripe-access-management/core build && pnpm --filter @stripe-access-management/database build && pnpm build && node ../../scripts/with-root-env.mjs node --test dist/test.js
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @stripe-access-management/core build && pnpm --filter @stripe-access-management/database build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
